S3_PUBLIC_ACCESS.description: S3 bucket is publicly accessible, which can expose sensitive data to the internet.
S3_PUBLIC_ACCESS.fix: Enable Block Public Access and restrict bucket policies to only trusted principals.

S3_ENCRYPTION_DISABLED.description: S3 bucket does not have server-side encryption enabled.
S3_ENCRYPTION_DISABLED.fix: Enable server-side encryption using SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS.

S3_VERSIONING_DISABLED.description: S3 bucket versioning is disabled, increasing the risk of accidental deletion or overwrite.
S3_VERSIONING_DISABLED.fix: Enable bucket versioning for recovery and data protection.

EC2_NO_IAM_ROLE.description: EC2 instance does not have an IAM role attached.
EC2_NO_IAM_ROLE.fix: Attach an IAM role with least-privilege permissions instead of using static credentials.

EC2_PUBLIC_EXPOSURE.description: EC2 instance is exposed to the public internet.
EC2_PUBLIC_EXPOSURE.fix: Place the instance behind a load balancer or restrict direct public exposure.

EC2_OPEN_SSH.description: EC2 instance allows SSH access from 0.0.0.0/0.
EC2_OPEN_SSH.fix: Restrict SSH access to trusted IP ranges or use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

EC2_NO_AUTOSCALING.description: EC2 instance is not part of an Auto Scaling strategy.
EC2_NO_AUTOSCALING.fix: Use an Auto Scaling Group to improve resilience and scalability.

EC2_SINGLE_AZ.description: EC2 instance is deployed in only one Availability Zone.
EC2_SINGLE_AZ.fix: Distribute compute resources across multiple Availability Zones for high availability.

NO_VPC_ISOLATION.description: Infrastructure lacks proper network isolation and private segmentation.
NO_VPC_ISOLATION.fix: Use private subnets and isolate sensitive workloads inside a segmented VPC design.

NO_NAT_GATEWAY.description: Private compute resources exist without a NAT Gateway for secure outbound internet access.
NO_NAT_GATEWAY.fix: Add a NAT Gateway or NAT instance to support outbound access from private subnets.

NO_FLOW_LOGS.description: VPC Flow Logs are not enabled, reducing network visibility and forensic capability.
NO_FLOW_LOGS.fix: Enable VPC Flow Logs and send them to CloudWatch Logs or S3.

NO_LOGGING_ENABLED.description: Centralized logging and monitoring are not enabled.
NO_LOGGING_ENABLED.fix: Enable CloudWatch logging, S3 access logging, and basic observability controls.
